JEP-AUXILIARY_BAG.title: Auxiliary Bag
JEP-AUXILIARY_BAG.description: Gain [blue]1[/blue] potion slot. Procure [blue]1[/blue] random potion at the start of each combat.
JEP-AUXILIARY_BAG.flavor: It's a bag full of potions!!
JEP-GEM_CASKET.title: Gem Casket
JEP-GEM_CASKET.description: Heal you by [green]5[/green] each you use a potion [gold]in combat[/gold].
JEP-BIRD_CAGE.title: Bird Cage
JEP-BIRD_CAGE.description: When you lose [blue]20[/blue] or more HP in a single turn, obtain a [gold]Boom Potion[/gold] (Once per combat).
JEP-DONUT_COUPON.title: Donut Coupon
JEP-DONUT_COUPON.description: Every [blue]3[/blue] times you raise your Max HP, obtain a [gold]Donut[/gold].
JEP-DONUT_COUPON.flavor: A coupon from a mysterious baker.
JEP-DYE.title: Dye
JEP-DYE.description: Upon pickup, obtain a copy of your latest [gold]Relic[/gold]. Cannot copy starter [gold]Relic[/gold]
JEP-DYE.flavor: You can draw anything you want with this dye!
